title: "ALTER TABLE mytable SET READ ONLY" results in server segfault
poc: alter table MyTable set read only;
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE command triggers server segmentation fault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE MyTable (a INT, b VARCHAR(50), c DATE, d FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO MyTable (a, b, c) VALUES (1, 'test', '2023-01-01');
ALTER TABLE MyTable ADD COLUMN e BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE;
UPDATE MyTable SET b = NULL WHERE a = 1;
ALTER TABLE MyTable SET READ ONLY;
